description: Blind two-stage retrieval cases created after the tuned suite. Do not tune the retrieval code after looking at this file's first run results.

cases.title: Motor traffic collision, licensing, and road offences
cases.case_facts: A driver is accused of careless driving after a collision and the lawyer needs licensing, registration, insurance, and road offence authorities.
cases.query: Motor Traffic careless driving collision driving licence vehicle registration insurance road traffic offence accident penalty

cases.title: Bribery allegation and asset declaration duties
cases.case_facts: A public officer is accused of taking a benefit for an official act and failing to disclose assets under anti-corruption rules.
cases.query: Bribery corruption public officer gratification asset declaration liabilities anti-corruption commission investigation offence

cases.title: Bank resolution and microfinance licensing
cases.case_facts: A lender faces Central Bank action over licensing, microfinance compliance, deposit protection, and special resolution measures.
cases.query: Banking Special Provisions Central Bank licensed bank microfinance licence renewal credit regulatory authority resolution order

cases.title: Urban development area declaration and land-use control
cases.case_facts: A property owner challenges an urban development area declaration and land-use restrictions for a local planning scheme.
cases.query: Urban Development Authority development area declaration land acquisition planning scheme approval restrictions regulation

cases.title: Parliamentary election nomination and poll dispute
cases.case_facts: A candidate wants to challenge nomination rejection, polling irregularities, and election propaganda restrictions.
cases.query: Parliamentary Elections nomination poll ballot election petition propaganda returning officer candidate voting

cases.title: Shop and office wages, overtime, and termination
cases.case_facts: An office employee claims unpaid overtime, unlawful working hours, and improper termination from a retail business.
cases.query: Shop and Office Employees wages remuneration working hours overtime employment termination women young persons regulation

cases.title: Consumer maximum retail price and unfair trade practice
cases.case_facts: A trader is investigated for violating a consumer maximum retail price order and misleading customers about goods.
cases.query: Consumer Affairs Authority maximum retail price order unfair trade practice goods services direction investigation

cases.title: Insurance claim, insurer regulation, and policy control
cases.case_facts: A policyholder disputes claim refusal and asks about insurer licensing, industry regulation, and special insurance provisions.
cases.query: Insurance industry insurer claim policy regulation control licence special provisions trust fund compensation

cases.title: Notarial deed execution and appointment status
cases.case_facts: A party challenges a deed because the notary's appointment, district authority, and registration formalities are disputed.
cases.query: Notaries Ordinance notary appointment deed execution attestation registrar general list notaries district authority

cases.title: Securities market conduct and unit trust compliance
cases.case_facts: An investment adviser is questioned about securities market registration, stock transfer rules, and unit trust compliance.
cases.query: Securities Exchange Commission registered stock securities market unit trust investment adviser registration transfer compliance
